CustomField.description: Minimum net unit price after all promo adjustments for this matrix entry. Blank = no floor (effective floor of 0). Sourced from this record into OrderItem.Floor_Price__c by the Price Matrix pricing element; the Apply Promotion Value formula uses it as the lower bound (MAX(Floor_Price__c, NetUnitPrice - Promotion_Value__c)) instead of clamping to 0. Units match SalesPrice__c (currency interpreted via the matrix record's CurrencyIsoCode).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional. Minimum net unit price after promo discounts. Leave blank for no floor.
CustomField.label: Floor Price
